---
applyTo: "Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/ProtoDef/*.proto,Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/Communication.cs,Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/Game.cs,Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/Pathfinding.cs,Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/Database.cs,Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/Scenedata.cs"
---

# Protobuf contracts & generated code

The IPC wire contract. Source `.proto` files live in
`Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/ProtoDef/`; the generated C# lands in the sibling
`Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/Generated/` subfolder.

## The rule

- **Edit only the `.proto` files.** The five generated outputs —
  `Generated/Communication.cs`, `Generated/Game.cs`, `Generated/Pathfinding.cs`,
  `Generated/Database.cs`, `Generated/Scenedata.cs` —
  carry `// <auto-generated> ... DO NOT EDIT!`. Any hand edit is overwritten on
  the next regen.
- After changing a `.proto`, **regenerate** and keep `.proto` + regenerated `.cs`
  in the **same commit**:

```bat
:: from repo root — C# outputs
Exports\BotCommLayer\Models\ProtoDef\protocsharp.bat
:: C++ outputs (when the native side consumes the contract)
Exports\BotCommLayer\Models\ProtoDef\protocpp.bat
```

- Then confirm it compiles and tests pass: `.\scripts\build.ps1` + `.\scripts\test-fast.ps1`.

## Not generated — edit freely

`Exports/BotCommLayer/Models/WoWActivitySnapshotExtensions.cs` is **hand-written**
(it lives in `Models/` — not the `Generated/` subfolder — and is deliberately
excluded from the glob above).

## Contract notes

- Runtime traffic is protobuf over TCP, **length-framed** (`[4-byte length][message]`).
- `ActivitySnapshot` carries state **deltas**, not full enemy/object payloads.
- `ObjectiveMessage` is what travels on the wire (formerly `ActionMessage`).

## See also

- `Exports/BotCommLayer/CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md` §11 (Proto and Generated Code),
  `docs/IPC_COMMUNICATION.md`.
